 Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This field is new, starting with the 2023 TAF DE RIF. It is not populated in data for earlier service years. 

There are up to three lock-in type of service fields. The LCKIN_TOS_CD_# corresponds with the 
LCKIN_PRVDR_ID_# and LCKIN_PRVDR_TYPE_CD_#.
